items.title: Why Do So Many Museums Hold a Convicted Antiquity Dealer’s Treasures?
items.summary: After The Met returned a Roman bust connected to Phoenix Ancient Art, the question of what will happen to other works sold by the gallery to dozens of US institutions remains open.
